evidence.title: Worldwide Developers Conference - Wikipedia
evidence.snippet: The **Worldwide Developers Conference** (**WWDC**) is an information technology conference held annually by Apple Inc. The conference is currently held at Apple Park in California. The event is used to showcase new software and technologies in the macOS, iOS, iPadOS, watchOS, tvOS, and visionOS families as well as other Apple software; new hardware products are sometimes announced as well.
